interpretation.why_not_complete: This is a multi-seed local virtual full-bundle closed-loop guidance evaluation using local PPO/VAE/denoiser checkpoints, proxy costs, and the enriched-USD runtime patch. It is useful paper-facing evidence, but not official BeyondMimic Fig. 5/Fig. 6 reproduction, TensorRT deployment, or real-robot evidence.

scope: Aggregates local virtual seed groups for four full-bundle closed-loop task-conditioned latent-guidance rollouts: joystick, waypoint, obstacle avoidance, and composed objectives.
